title: Implement JSON-native scorecard migration procedure YAML

comments.author: derek
comments.text: Starting implementation: add new procedure YAML under plexus/procedures for JSON export -> scorecard migration, modeled after scorecard_create with deterministic question mapping.

comments.author: derek
comments.text: Implemented new procedure file plexus/procedures/scorecard_from_question_export.yaml. It consumes ai-ready question export JSON (inline or file path), performs deterministic score planning per question, enforces human approval, supports dry_run, checks scorecard existence, and executes create/update through actor tool chain. Added README entry. Validation: YAML parse + pytest plexus/cli/procedure/test_service_yaml_loader.py.
